title: Canadian Bean Crumble
description: A hearty, comforting dish featuring Canadian beans in a crispy crumble topping.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together Canadian beans, fermented cheese, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Transfer the bean mixture to a baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together crumble topping ingredients.
Add olive oil to the crumble topping and mix until crumbly.
Spread the crumble topping evenly over the bean mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the topping is golden brown.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
